name: reduced acceptor:prostaglandin G2 oxidoreductase
definition: Prostaglandin H2 + Acceptor + H2O <=> Prostaglandin G2 + Reduced acceptor

name: NADH:ferricytochrome-b5 oxidoreductase
definition: NADH + 2 Ferricytochrome b5 <=> NAD+ + 2 Ferrocytochrome b5 + H+

name: N-(omega)-hydroxyarginine,NADPH:oxygen oxidoreductase (nitric-oxide-forming)
definition: NADPH + 2 N(omega)-Hydroxyarginine + 2 Oxygen + H+ <=> NADP+ + 2 Nitric oxide + 2 L-Citrulline + 2 H2O

name: glutathione:NADP+ oxidoreductase
definition: 2 Glutathione + NADP+ <=> Glutathione disulfide + NADPH + H+

name: NADP+:nicotinate ADP-ribosyltransferase
definition: NADP+ + Nicotinate <=> Nicotinamide + Nicotinic acid adenine dinucleotide phosphate

name: glutathione:oxygen oxidoreductase
definition: Oxygen + 2 Glutathione <=> Glutathione disulfide + Hydrogen peroxide

name: carbon-dioxide:ammonia ligase (ADP-forming,carbamate-phosphorylating)
definition: 2 ATP + Ammonia + CO2 + H2O <=> 2 ADP + Orthophosphate + Carbamoyl phosphate

name: ATP:carbamate phosphotransferase
definition: ATP + Ammonia + HCO3- <=> ADP + Carbamoyl phosphate + H2O

name: ATP:L-methionine S-adenosyltransferase
definition: Orthophosphate + Diphosphate + S-Adenosyl-L-methionine <=> ATP + L-Methionine + H2O

name: deamido-NAD+:ammonia ligase (AMP-forming)
definition: ATP + Deamino-NAD+ + Ammonia <=> AMP + Diphosphate + NAD+

name: (S)-lactate:ferricytochrome-c 2-oxidoreductase
definition: (S)-Lactate + 2 Ferricytochrome c <=> Pyruvate + 2 Ferrocytochrome c + 2 H+

name: (R)-lactate:ferricytochrome-c 2-oxidoreductase
definition: (R)-Lactate + 2 Ferricytochrome c <=> Pyruvate + 2 Ferrocytochrome c + 2 H+

name: (R)-lactate:ferricytochrome-c-553 2-oxidoreductase
definition: (R)-Lactate + 2 Ferricytochrome c-553 <=> Pyruvate + 2 Ferrocytochrome c-553 + 2 H+

name: ATP:pyruvate,water phosphotransferase
definition: ATP + Pyruvate + H2O <=> AMP + Phosphoenolpyruvate + Orthophosphate

name: ATP:pyruvate,phosphate phosphotransferase
definition: ATP + Pyruvate + Orthophosphate <=> AMP + Phosphoenolpyruvate + Diphosphate

name: pyruvate:NAD+ 2-oxidoreductase (CoA-acetylating)
definition: Pyruvate + CoA + NAD+ <=> Acetyl-CoA + CO2 + NADH + H+

name: pyruvate:NADP+ 2-oxidoreductase (CoA-acetylating)
definition: Pyruvate + CoA + NADP+ <=> Acetyl-CoA + CO2 + NADPH + H+

name: acetate:CoA ligase (ADP-forming)
definition: ATP + Acetate + CoA <=> ADP + Acetyl-CoA + Orthophosphate

name: acetate:CoA ligase (AMP-forming)
definition: ATP + Acetate + CoA <=> AMP + Diphosphate + Acetyl-CoA

name: L-glutamate:NAD+ oxidoreductase (deaminating)
definition: L-Glutamate + NAD+ + H2O <=> 2-Oxoglutarate + Ammonia + NADH + H+

name: L-glutamate gamma-semialdehyde:NAD+ oxidoreductase
definition: L-Glutamate 5-semialdehyde + NAD+ + H2O <=> L-Glutamate + NADH + H+

name: L-glutamate:NADP+ oxidoreductase (deaminating)
definition: L-Glutamate + NADP+ + H2O <=> 2-Oxoglutarate + Ammonia + NADPH + H+

name: L-glutamate:ammonia ligase (ADP-forming)
definition: ATP + L-Glutamate + Ammonia <=> ADP + Orthophosphate + L-Glutamine

name: deamido-NAD+:L-glutamine amido-ligase (AMP-forming)
definition: ATP + Deamino-NAD+ + L-Glutamine + H2O <=> AMP + Diphosphate + NAD+ + L-Glutamate

name: glutathione:hydrogen-peroxide oxidoreductase
definition: Hydrogen peroxide + 2 Glutathione <=> Glutathione disulfide + 2 H2O

name: pyridoxamine-5'-phosphate:oxygen oxidoreductase (deaminating)
definition: Pyridoxamine phosphate + H2O + Oxygen <=> Pyridoxal phosphate + Ammonia + Hydrogen peroxide

name: pyridoxine 5'-phosphate:oxygen oxidoreductase
definition: Pyridoxine phosphate + Oxygen <=> Hydrogen peroxide + Pyridoxal phosphate

name: UDP-glucose:NAD+ 6-oxidoreductase
definition: UDP-glucose + H2O + 2 NAD+ <=> UDP-glucuronate + 2 NADH + 2 H+

name: protoheme,NADPH---hemoprotein reductase:oxygen oxidoreductase (alpha-methene-oxidizing, hydroxylating)
definition: Heme + 3 [Reduced NADPH---hemoprotein reductase] + 3 Oxygen <=> Biliverdin + CO + Fe2+ + 3 [Oxidized NADPH---hemoprotein reductase] + 3 H2O

name: pyruvate:carbon-dioxide ligase (ADP-forming)
definition: ATP + Pyruvate + HCO3- <=> ADP + Orthophosphate + Oxaloacetate
